In a mixing bowl, combine the eggs, AP Flour, and Salt using an immersion blender until fully smooth and homogenous
Set up a 2 step breading station - one hotel pan for batter, and one hotel pan for panko breadcrumbs
With one hand, hold the chicken by the airline bone and dip into the wet batter.  Shake excess batter.
Transfer to the panko, ensuring as little drippage as possible, and use the other hand to pat the panko into the breading.
Reserve on sheet tray lined with parchment.
Reserve in cooler on speed rack, covered with another sheet tray or lexon lid.
